'''shahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaebol|chaebol]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-h-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaebol|chaebol]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shahaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæhækæth|shæhækæth]] || [[word:shæhækæj|shæhækæj]] || [[word:shæhækæsh|shæhækæsh]] || [[word:shæhækæ|shæhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shahahakath|shahahakath]] || [[word:shahahakaj|shahahakaj]] || [[word:shahahakash|shahahakash]] || [[word:shahahaka|shahahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shahakath|shahakath]] || [[word:shahakaj|shahakaj]] || [[word:shahakash|shahakash]] || [[word:shahaka|shahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shahafkath|shahafkath]] || [[word:shahafkaj|shahafkaj]] || [[word:shahafkash|shahafkash]] || [[word:shahafkaf|shahafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shahakatha|shahakatha]] || [[word:shahakaja|shahakaja]] || [[word:shahakasha|shahakasha]] || [[word:shahakaka|shahakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shahakath|shahakath]] || [[word:shahakaj|shahakaj]] || [[word:shahakash|shahakash]] || [[word:shahaka|shahaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shahakathal|shahakathal]] || [[word:shahakajal|shahakajal]] || [[word:shahakashal|shahakashal]] || [[word:shahakakal|shahakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shahakathatha|shahakathatha]] || [[word:shahakajaja|shahakajaja]] || [[word:shahakashasha|shahakashasha]] || [[word:shahakaka|shahakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shahakathan|shahakathan]] || [[word:shahakajan|shahakajan]] || [[word:shahakashan|shahakashan]] || [[word:shahakakan|shahakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shahakathaoro|shahakathaoro]] || [[word:shahakajaoro|shahakajaoro]] || [[word:shahakashaoro|shahakashaoro]] || [[word:shahakakaoro|shahakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
